items.title: From Dybantsa vs. Peterson to Yang Hansen: My 2026 Summer League Watch List
items.author: NBA Big Board
items.body_excerpt: Today marks the official start of the 2026 NBA Summer League in Las Vegas, with games tipping off through July 19. For me, Summer League has become one of the must watch events on the NBA calendar. Unfortunately, I won’t be in attendance this year, as I’m still living in Paris.…

items.title: Nate Ament was an interested spectator in Sacramento, trying to soak in as much as he could. His rookie deal became official today, so the teenager will suit up for the Bucks in Las Vegas.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt: Nate Ament was an interested spectator in Sacramento, trying to soak in as much as he could. His rookie deal became official today, so the teenager will suit up for the Bucks in Las Vegas.

items.title: Elder millennials no doubt have a chuckle / shout at a cloud about this "concept" but it's easy to forget these kids entire lives have been recorded, broadcast, shared, linked to, etc.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Elder millennials no doubt have a chuckle / shout at a cloud about this "concept" but it's easy to forget these kids entire lives have been recorded, broadcast, shared, linked to, etc. 

I can easily turn off my phone and disappear for as long as I don't need it for work. Not as easy for kids.

items.title: Just one year ago, the #Bucks were trying to extend a championship window around an all-time great.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Just one year ago, the #Bucks were trying to extend a championship window around an all-time great.

Now?

They just hope to be competitive, at some point, and then competitive on a yearly basis. 

A stark 180.

media.title: Lynx's Cheryl Reeve sets WNBA record for regular-season wins
media.description: The Lynx gave Cheryl Reeve, who already boasted the most total wins including postseason play of any coach in WNBA history, her 380th regular-season victory Wednesday night.

items.title: Hollander POTD Jim Paxson. Star SG for Dayton drafted 12th by POR in 79. Developed into all-star scorer, peaking at 21.7 ppg & started for 7 years. Traded to BOS in 88 where was never healthy & annoyed Bird. Retired in 90, later GM in CLE from 99-05 (he drafted LBJ).
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Jim Paxson. Star SG for Dayton drafted 12th by POR in 79. Developed into all-star scorer, peaking at 21.7 ppg & started for 7 years. Traded to BOS in 88 where was never healthy & annoyed Bird. Retired in 90, later GM in CLE from 99-05 (he drafted LBJ).

items.title: Ugly, ugly game for the Fever. 106-92 loss to the Sparks. Fever were up 10 after ~8 minutes of play, then outscored by 26 in the last 32 minutes.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Ugly, ugly game for the Fever. 106-92 loss to the Sparks. Fever were up 10 after ~8 minutes of play, then outscored by 26 in the last 32 minutes.

Kelsey Mitchell had 29, but the Fever's defense was rough. They're 12-9 with another game tomorrow in Phoenix.

items.title: Not a good showing from the Fever, completing their season series vs LA with a 106-92 loss. Allowed 100+ pts in 7 of 9 losses.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Not a good showing from the Fever, completing their season series vs LA with a 106-92 loss. Allowed 100+ pts in 7 of 9 losses.

Boston missed her 2nd game as a pro, Clark played 16mins on a restriction, Cunningham hurt in warmups, foul trouble & turnovers (17).

Next: Thu. at PHX

items.author: Kerith Burke
items.body_excerpt: 4:50am here. Valks win 6th straight, a franchise record. Janelle Salaun career night with 26 points in 23 mins.  This rocks!!!

items.title: This minutes restriction can't be easy on Clark — playing in short bursts, which makes it difficult to find a rhythm.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
This minutes restriction can't be easy on Clark — playing in short bursts, which makes it difficult to find a rhythm.

And she wants to play every minute. This is a long-term play so she has to abide by the medical staff's management plan to get right.

Six more games til ASB.

items.title: Three shots from nine feet and in, Fever missed all three. Fever made two of them harder than they had to. That kind of night. They're down 91-77 with 5:40 to go.
items.author: Tony East
